mechanism: H hops between adjacent S2 dimers

barriers.note: Forward barrier only. Intermediate minima at -0.156/-0.146 eV; effective barrier from intermediate = 0.231 eV. Size convergence significant.
ML significantly overestimates for pyrite (S2 dimer chemistry poorly captured)

consensus: 0.18-0.19 eV hop barrier (1x1x1, three-code agreement within 5%). 2x2x2: lower forward barrier (0.075 eV) but intermediate minima complicate the picture.
physical_implication: Low hop barrier, BUT vacancy formation energy E_f(V_S) = 1.95 eV makes effective diffusion barrier ~1.1 eV. Pyrite is NOT a fast H+ conductor despite low hop barrier.

vacancy_formation.status: running (ABACUS PW GPU, 96 atoms, 2x2x2 supercell, W1 instance)
